classes.smallest_honest_meaning: Failure exposes a surface not previously tracked.
Same broad failure is localized to a smaller object, field, layer, or boundary.
Same recurrence key returns with no sharper classification.
Same failure recurs after attempted changes with no decision-surface delta.
Stop is an intended boundary of current regime.
Failure exposes useful pressure but does not authorize execution.
Pressure exists but does not sharpen, localize, identify evidence, or expose lawful next decision surface.
Failure exposes a concrete missing object.
No registered move exists for pressure class; route to missing-move proposal/review.
Failure cannot be honestly classified because required evidence is absent.
B2 cannot classify using current records.
